en: Then Jacob called his sons and said, "Gather yourselves together, that I may tell you what shall happen to you in days to come.
zh: 雅各把他的眾子叫來，說：“你們要聚集在一起，我要把你們日後必遇到的事告訴你們。

en: "Assemble and listen, O sons of Jacob, listen to Israel your father.
zh: 雅各的兒子們哪，你們要一起來聽； 要聽你們父親以色列的話。

en: "Reuben, you are my firstborn, my might, and the firstfruits of my strength, preeminent in dignity and preeminent in power.
zh: 流本哪，你是我的長子， 是我的力量，是我的初生子； 你大有尊榮，權力超眾；

en: Unstable as water, you shall not have preeminence, because you went up to your father's bed; then you defiled it- he went up to my couch!
zh: 但是你放縱情慾，好像水沸騰一樣，你必不能居首位； 因為你上了你父親的床； 上了我的榻，然後把它玷污了。

en: "Simeon and Levi are brothers; weapons of violence are their swords.
zh: 西緬和利未是兄弟； 他們的刀劍是強暴的武器。

en: Let my soul come not into their council; O my glory, be not joined to their company. For in their anger they killed men, and in their willfulness they hamstrung oxen.
zh: 我的靈啊，不可加入他們的陰謀； 我的心啊，不可參與他們的集會， 因為他們在怒中殺人， 任意砍斷牛的腿筋。

en: Cursed be their anger, for it is fierce, and their wrath, for it is cruel! I will divide them in Jacob and scatter them in Israel.
zh: 他們的怒氣可咒，因為非常暴烈； 他們的烈怒可詛，因為十分兇猛； 我要把他們分散在雅各家； 把他們散居在以色列。

en: "Judah, your brothers shall praise you; your hand shall be on the neck of your enemies; your father's sons shall bow down before you.
zh: 猶大啊，你的兄弟們要稱讚你； 你的手必壓住仇敵的頸項； 你父親的眾子必向你下拜。

en: Judah is a lion's cub; from the prey, my son, you have gone up. He stooped down; he crouched as a lion and as a lioness; who dares rouse him?
zh: 猶大是隻小獅子； 我兒啊，你獵取了食物就上到洞穴去。 他屈身伏臥，好像公獅， 又像母獅，誰敢驚動他呢？

en: The scepter shall not depart from Judah, nor the ruler's staff from between his feet, until tribute comes to him; and to him shall be the obedience of the peoples.
zh: 權杖必不離開猶大， 王圭必不離他兩腳之間， 直到細羅 來到， 萬族都要臣服他。

en: Binding his foal to the vine and his donkey's colt to the choice vine, he has washed his garments in wine and his vesture in the blood of grapes.
zh: 猶大把自己的驢駒拴在葡萄樹旁， 把自己的小驢繫在上等的葡萄樹旁； 他在葡萄酒中洗淨自己的衣服， 在血紅的葡萄汁中洗衣袍。

en: His eyes are darker than wine, and his teeth whiter than milk.
zh: 他因飲酒而雙眼發紅， 他因喝奶而牙齒雪白。

en: "Zebulun shall dwell at the shore of the sea; he shall become a haven for ships, and his border shall be at Sidon.
zh: 西布倫必在沿海地帶居住， 他必成為船隻停泊的港口， 他的邊界必伸到西頓。

en: "Issachar is a strong donkey, crouching between the sheepfolds.
zh: 以薩迦是一頭粗壯的驢， 伏臥在羊圈 之間；

en: He saw that a resting place was good, and that the land was pleasant, so he bowed his shoulder to bear, and became a servant at forced labor.
zh: 他看安居為美， 他看肥地為佳， 他屈肩負重， 成了服苦的奴僕。

en: "Dan shall judge his people as one of the tribes of Israel.
zh: 但要審判自己的人民， 作以色列的一個支派。

en: Dan shall be a serpent in the way, a viper by the path, that bites the horse's heels so that his rider falls backward.
zh: 但要作路上的蛇， 道中的毒蛇， 他要咬傷馬蹄， 使騎馬的人向後墜落。

en: I wait for your salvation, O LORD.
zh: 耶和華啊，我向來等候你的拯救。

en: "Raiders shall raid Gad, but he shall raid at their heels.
zh: 迦得必被侵略者追逼， 他卻要追逼他們的腳跟。

en: "Asher's food shall be rich, and he shall yield royal delicacies.
zh: 至於亞設，他的食物必定肥美， 他有美食可以供奉君王。

en: "Naphtali is a doe let loose that bears beautiful fawns.
zh: 拿弗他利是隻得釋放的母鹿， 發出優美的言語。

en: "Joseph is a fruitful bough, a fruitful bough by a spring; his branches run over the wall.
zh: 約瑟是一根結果子的樹枝， 是一根泉旁結果子的樹枝， 他的枝條蔓延出牆外。

en: The archers bitterly attacked him, shot at him, and harassed him severely,
zh: 弓箭手把他苦害， 向他射箭敵對他。

en: yet his bow remained unmoved; his arms were made agile by the hands of the Mighty One of Jacob (from there is the Shepherd, the Stone of Israel),
zh: 但他的弓依然堅硬， 他的手臂仍舊敏捷， 這是出於雅各的大能者之手； 出於以色列的牧者，以色列的磐石。

en: by the God of your father who will help you, by the Almighty who will bless you with blessings of heaven above, blessings of the deep that crouches beneath, blessings of the breasts and of the womb.
zh: 是你父親的 神幫助你， 是那全能者賜給你； 他把從天上來的福， 地下深淵蘊藏著的福， 哺乳和生育的福，都賜給你。

en: The blessings of your father are mighty beyond the blessings of my parents, up to the bounties of the everlasting hills. May they be on the head of Joseph, and on the brow of him who was set apart from his brothers.
zh: 你父親的祝福， 勝過我祖先的祝福 ，勝過永遠山嶺上的美物。 願這些福都降在約瑟的頭上， 降在兄弟中作王子的那一位頭上。

en: "Benjamin is a ravenous wolf, in the morning devouring the prey and at evening dividing the spoil."
zh: 便雅憫是隻撕掠的豺狼， 早晨吞吃他的獵物， 晚上瓜分他的擄物。”

en: All these are the twelve tribes of Israel. This is what their father said to them as he blessed them, blessing each with the blessing suitable to him.
zh: 這些就是以色列的十二支派；以上是他們父親對他們所說的話，是按著各人的福分給他們所祝的福。

en: Then he commanded them and said to them, "I am to be gathered to my people; bury me with my fathers in the cave that is in the field of Ephron the Hittite,
zh: 雅各又囑咐他們，對他們說：“我快要歸到我的親族那裡去，你們要把我埋葬在赫人以弗崙田間的洞裡，與我的祖先在一起。

en: in the cave that is in the field at Machpelah, to the east of Mamre, in the land of Canaan, which Abraham bought with the field from Ephron the Hittite to possess as a burying place.
zh: 這個洞在迦南地，在幔利前面的麥比拉的田間。那地方原是亞伯拉罕向赫人以弗崙買下來作墳地的。

en: There they buried Abraham and Sarah his wife. There they buried Isaac and Rebekah his wife, and there I buried Leah-
zh: 他們在那裡埋葬了亞伯拉罕和他的妻子撒拉；又在那裡埋葬了以撒和他的妻子利百加；我也在那裡埋葬了利亞。

en: the field and the cave that is in it were bought from the Hittites."
zh: 那塊田和田間的洞，是向赫人買來的。”

en: When Jacob finished commanding his sons, he drew up his feet into the bed and breathed his last and was gathered to his people.
zh: 雅各對他的眾子囑咐完了，就把雙腳收回床上，氣絕而死，歸到他的親族那裡去了。
